task_completion.description: Update the user's Title, Department, and Office Phone
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the SuiteCRM user profile edit screen or detail view, the 'Title' field is set to 'Customer Service Representative', 'Department' is set to 'Global Support', and 'Office Phone' is set to '(555) 019-9283'.

task_completion.description: Update the Date and Time Format preferences
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Advanced' or 'Preferences' tab of the user profile, the 'Date Format' dropdown is set to '2010-12-23' (Y-m-d) and the 'Time Format' dropdown is set to '23:00' (24-hour format).

task_completion.description: Create a new email signature with the correct name
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Email Settings or Signatures section, a signature is being created or exists with the Name field explicitly set to 'Support Standard'.

task_completion.description: Add the required text to the email signature
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WYSIWYG editor for the signature body contains the text 'Customer Service Representative' and 'Global Support'.

task_completion.description: Embed the required image into the email signature
task_completion.visual_evidence: The WYSIWYG editor for the signature body displays an embedded image (the support logo from /home/ga/Documents/support_logo.png) alongside the text.

task_completion.description: Save all profile and signature changes
task_completion.visual_evidence: The agent clicks 'Save' on the profile/signature forms, and the final screenshots show the user profile detail view reflecting the new saved values without unsaved changes warnings.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the SuiteCRM application in a web browser, rather than using terminal commands, database queries, or API scripts to modify the user profile.

integrity.description: The agent actually uploaded or embedded the image file
integrity.visual_evidence: The signature editor should show the actual rendered image, not just the text path '/home/ga/Documents/support_logo.png' pasted as plain text.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the output
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should not show the browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools open to manipulate the DOM text.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Profile Updates: Title: 'Customer Service Representative', Department: 'Global Support', Office Phone: '(555) 019-9283'. Expected Regional Settings: Date Format: '2010-12-23' (Y-m-d), Time Format: '23:00' (H:i). Expected Signature: Name: 'Support Standard', must contain the specified text and the support_logo.png image.
